content:
IVX HOLDINGS — FINAL PRODUCTION CLOSURE BLOCK

The audit is complete. Stop creating new reports.

Focus only on closing the remaining production blockers.

==================================================
PHASE 1 — REAL ANDROID QA
==================================================

Generate the final production APK.

Verify on a real Android device:

1. Install APK
2. Upgrade from previous version
3. Owner login
4. Member login
5. Chat
6. Feed
7. Image upload
8. Video upload
9. Reels playback
10. Notifications
11. AI responses
12. Logout/login persistence
13. App restart
14. Offline/online recovery
15. Crash monitoring

Return:

- APK filename
- Version
- Build ID
- SHA-256 checksum
- Device used
- Android version
- PASS/FAIL for every test

==================================================
PHASE 2 — OWNER COMMAND CENTER
==================================================

Complete and deploy the IVX AI Engineering Command Center.

Display:

- All 12 AI developers
- Current task
- Status
- Progress
- Last commit SHA
- Last deployment ID
- Last test result
- Production verification
- Current blocker

==================================================
PHASE 3 — LIVE AI EXECUTION
==================================================

Every AI must execute real work.

Show:

- Current repository task
- Files changed
- Commit SHA
- Tests executed
- Deployment ID
- Production verification

Do not show idle agents if work exists.

==================================================
PHASE 4 — FINAL SYNCHRONIZATION
==================================================

Verify:

GitHub HEAD SHA
=
Render Live SHA
=
/version SHA

Verify:

Supabase
GitHub
Render
AI Gateway

All synchronized.

==================================================
PHASE 5 — FINAL PRODUCTION REPORT
==================================================

Return only:

1. Production Status
2. Remaining blockers
3. APK download location
4. Commit SHA
5. Deployment ID
6. Live URL
7. Health status
8. Version status
9. Android QA result
10. Confirmation that all 12 AI developers are active with their assigned permanent roles.

If any item fails, report the exact root cause and fix it before marking the project complete.

Do not create another audit. Complete the remaining production work and provide evidence only.
